description: A forensic odontologist needs a 3D model of the patient's dentition for identification from the loaded CT Cranium scan. Create a 3D surface model of the teeth enamel and dense petrous bone using a segmentation mask with a threshold range of 1500 to 3071 HU. Export the model as a binary STL to /home/ga/Documents/enamel_model.stl and save the project to /home/ga/Documents/enamel_project.inv3.
